raw_consumer_statement:
I have written to Exxon, Citi, XXXX  in XXXX XXXX, XXXX  and informed them of the fraudulent charges on the Exxon mobile credit card. I did not make the charges.

When I made purchases at Exxon, they were for {$10.00} or less. The highest purchase was for {$50.00} plus. 

I closed the account because someone was using new credit cards that I had not received in the mail. Exxon and Citi are not paying attention to details regarding this scam on the Exxon credit card. I closed the account because Exxon was not taking charge and handling my scam issues.

I have given Exxon all the information on the account which you will see in the attachment. I am getting nowhere with them in getting the charges dropped which I did not make. 

I want this dispute resolved in my favor. I am a citizen who is XXXX  years of age. 
I did not make any of the charges. 

I have never let anyone use the credit card or gave out the credit number.
